prestazioni: KJ-ZEM 2.3L Miller-cycle V6 engine: Install a custom forced-induction system using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a Spearco 400hp intercooler kit, paired with a Tomei 264° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 18 psi tuning on 93 octane fuel.

KJ-ZEM-specific intake manifold upgrade: Replace the stock manifold with a custom-fabricated aluminum equal-length ITB (individual throttle body) setup using Jenvey 45mm throttle bodies, mated to a custom 3.5" velocity stack intake system with a K&N XStream air filter for optimized airflow at high RPM (8,500+ redline).

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain: Install a Cusco 2.5-way limited-slip differential with 40% preload, paired with a Mazdaspeed 6-speed manual transmission swap (from the Mazdaspeed6) using a South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch. Reinforce the subframe with a Cusco front strut tower bar and a custom 3-point rear subframe brace to handle increased torque (350+ lb-ft).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Mazda Millenia-specific, not generic) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 rear bumper lip and a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards (3M 1080 vinyl wrap in "Lime Green" with matte black accents).

Custom 19x9.5" (front) and 19x10.5" (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels with a 35mm front and 30mm rear spacer setup, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/35/19 (front) and 275/30/19 (rear) tires for aggressive stance and grip.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Mazda Millenia-specific mounting brackets), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded) with Alcantara-wrapped A-pillars and door cards (color-matched to the exterior wrap).
